vibe: Gritty Mat-Room, industrial, bold typography, fight-night promo poster

textures.noise_css: background-image: url("data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg viewBox='0 0 200 200' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%3E%3Cfilter id='noiseFilter'%3E%3CfeTurbulence type='fractalNoise' baseFrequency='0.65' numOctaves='3' stitchTiles='stitch'/%3E%3C/filter%3E%3Crect width='100%25' height='100%25' filter='url(%23noiseFilter)' opacity='0.05'/%3E%3C/svg%3E");

global.body: Background color #0A0A0A, color #FFFFFF. Add subtle SVG noise overlay for grit.
global.header: Solid dark background or heavy glassmorphism with a sharp red 2px bottom border. Use flexbox for spacing. Navigation links in 'Barlow' bold, uppercase, tracking-wide. Hover state: text color changes to #E51400.
global.announcement_banner: Full width, dark red background (#B31000) with white text. Font: Barlow 500. Angled clip-path bottom edge optional.
global.footer: Heavy padding (4rem 0). Dark surface #141414. 'Powered by syndiscore.ai' in Barlow text-secondary. Top border 1px solid #27272A.
global.audio_toggle: Fixed bottom right. Angled box (clip-path) or sharp square instead of a circle. Solid #E51400 background.

index.hero_slideshow: Remove perfect circle mask. Use a jagged brush-stroke SVG mask or sharp angled polygon (e.g. clip-path: polygon(0 0, 100% 0, 95% 100%, 0% 100%)) to make the slideshow feel like a hardcore fight poster. Add a dark vignette overlay (box-shadow inset or gradient) so text pops. Text inside: 'Anton' massive H1, white.
index.welcome_blurb: Asymmetric bento layout. Large Anton heading left, Barlow text right. Red vertical accent line (4px width) next to the paragraph.

about.mission_statement: Massive typography focus. H1 'OUR MISSION' in Anton, red text stroke with transparent fill, or pure white. High contrast.
about.core_values: Bento grid (tetris style). Not centered equal cards. Mix spans (e.g., Discipline takes 2 cols, Respect 1 col). Cards have sharp corners, 1px solid #27272A border, hover state gives a hard 4px red shadow (4px 4px 0px #E51400) and transforms -4px Y.

schedule.tables: Border-collapse, width 100%. Headers: background #141414, font Anton, uppercase. Rows: background #0A0A0A, border-bottom 1px solid #27272A. Hover row: background #1A1A1A, border-left 4px solid #E51400. High contrast, raw data feel.

contact.layout: CSS Grid, 1fr 1fr on desktop. Left side: Form. Right side: Contact Info with huge typography for phone/email.
contact.form: Inputs: background #141414, border 1px solid #27272A, color #FFF, padding 1rem, sharp corners. Focus: border-color #E51400, outline none. Button: Solid #E51400, text white, uppercase Anton, hover: background #B31000.

winter_signups.form_retheme: Strip the 'ice/blue' CSS. Apply the Gritty Mat-Room form styles (dark inputs, sharp corners, red focus rings, heavy red CTAs). Wrap in a container with a dark textured background.

motion_and_interaction.hover_states: Buttons translate up (-2px) and gain a hard offset shadow (4px 4px 0px #E51400). Nav links underline sweep from left to right.
motion_and_interaction.page_load: Fade in with a slight upward translation (staggered for bento grid cards).
motion_and_interaction.slideshow_transition: Fast, hard cuts or fast crossfades. Avoid slow, soft romantic fades.

media_and_images.image_treatment: All photos should have increased contrast and a slight desaturation or dark vignette to maintain the hardcore, industrial gym aesthetic. Ensure text over images has a heavy text-shadow or a dark gradient overlay underneath to pass APCA contrast checks.

testing_attributes: All interactive elements (buttons, links, form inputs) must include data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='submit-contact-form', data-testid='nav-schedule-link').
instructions_to_main_agent: Use pure HTML, CSS, and Vanilla JS only. Do not use React or Tailwind.
All CSS should ideally reside in a shared style.css, with page-specific overrides in <style> blocks if necessary.
Do not touch any admin pages.
Ensure all JSON-driven data logic (schedule tables) remains intact, only change the CSS classes or HTML structure to match the new styles.
Retain the background music toggle logic globally, but style the button to match the gritty theme.
Replace all Montserrat and glowy red borders with the Anton/Barlow typography and sharp, industrial borders/hard-shadows defined above.
